motor_cortex.name: Motor Cortex (Code/Execution)
motor_cortex.bio_analog: Primary motor cortex (M1) — voluntary action execution
motor_cortex.paper_ref: Chen et al. 2021 — Codex evaluation shows LLMs strongest in code generation

parietal_cortex.name: Parietal Cortex (Math/Numerical)
parietal_cortex.bio_analog: Intraparietal sulcus (IPS) — numerical cognition, magnitude processing

prefrontal_cortex.name: Prefrontal Cortex (Logic/Reasoning)
prefrontal_cortex.bio_analog: Dorsolateral PFC (dlPFC) — abstract reasoning, planning, logic
prefrontal_cortex.paper_ref: Wei et al. 2022 CoT; Wang et al. 2023 Self-Consistency; Logic wall at 67%

temporal_cortex.name: Temporal Cortex (Knowledge/Memory)
temporal_cortex.bio_analog: Anterior temporal lobe (ATL) — semantic memory, factual knowledge

language_area.name: Language Area (Broca/Wernicke)
language_area.paper_ref: GLM-4+ strongest Chinese; Kimi strongest writing (evolved_weights.json)

visual_cortex.name: Visual Cortex (Vision/Multimodal)
